betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Warning: Redstone Conduits§f:
This is a §cmandatory warning quest§f about a known bug interaction between NC's Neutron Sources and item-transporting conduits.

§cThe Bug§f:
When a §bRedstone Conduit§f (or any item-transporting conduit, e.g. EnderIO, Mekanism, Thermal) is placed adjacent to a §bNeutron Source§f in a Solid Fission Reactor, the world will enter a §9repeating crash loop§f on next reload. The crash is caused by the conduit trying to interact with the Neutron Source's TileEntity during a chunk load.

§6The Fix§f:
- §cDo NOT attach any item-transporting conduit directly to a Neutron Source tile.§f
- Use §bfluid conduits only§f (e.g. Mekanism Universal Cables in fluid mode, Thermal Fluiducts) for Neutron Sources.
- Place the Neutron Source with at least one block of air gap on every face where a conduit might attach.
- If you must transport items in/out of a reactor, route the conduit to a §bFuel Cell§f or §bCell Port§f, not the Neutron Source.

§6Affected Tile Entities§f:
- nuclearcraft:fission_source (Neutron Source)
- nuclearcraft:fission_irradiator_port (Fission Irradiator Port) — partially affected

§6Why This Happens§f:
NC's Neutron Source tile uses a custom IItemHandler that is incompatible with the conduit's standard IItemHandler queries. The conduit's tick update causes a ClassCastException in the neutron source's update packet, which the chunk loader retries indefinitely.

§6If You Already Triggered the Bug§f:
- Open the world's level.dat with NBTExplorer
- Remove the offending conduit tile (and the chunk it was in) by editing ForgeChunkManager data
- Or use MCEdit to delete the affected conduit block
- Reload the world — the crash should be resolved

§cWarning§f: This is a §eknown critical bug§f. Every reactor builder should read this before placing a Neutron Source.

§cWarning§f: If you experience mysterious crashes near your reactor, the first thing to check is whether a Redstone Conduit (or similar) is touching a Neutron Source.

§eTip§f: For an alternative Neutron Source placement, use a §bRedstone Conduit §9->§f Hopper §9->§f Neutron Source §9->§f Hopper §9->§f Fuel Cell§f chain. The hoppers act as buffers and prevent the conduit from directly touching the source.

§eTip§f: This warning was added because the bug is silent (no in-game error message) and crashes the entire world on next load. Prevention is the only practical fix.
